case_title: GARAVUSO RICHARD VS SALLEIN JERALD M.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SALLEIN JERALD M. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT GARAVUSO RICHARD STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
